name: Lean / Jobs-to-be-Done
description: Problem-explore (diverge) -> Problem-pick (converge) -> Solution-explore (diverge) -> Validate (converge). Lean-startup framing around the customer's job-to-be-done.
when_to_use: When you want to anchor on the customer's job, find the highest-value problem, then validate a minimal solution.

phases.name: Problem Explore
phases.intent: Explore the jobs-to-be-done and the problems blocking them, broadly across customers.

phases.name: Problem Pick
phases.intent: Pick the single highest-value, most-underserved problem/job to solve first.

phases.name: Solution Explore
phases.intent: Explore solution/MVP candidates and build a minimal prototype.

phases.name: Validate
phases.intent: Personas use the MVP; validate the value proposition and converge to a buildable spec.
